get.summary: Get a demo PDF file to be used by test purpose
get.description:
To use this endpoint is necessary to enable the debug mode in your instance. To do this, run the command:
`occ config:system:set debug --value true --type boolean`
This router is used to be possible render pages with /f/, is a workaround at frontend side to identify pages with authenticated accounts

get.description: Validate a file returning file data. The response always includes `filesCount` and `files`. For `nodeType=file`, `filesCount=1` and `files` contains the current file. For `nodeType=envelope`, `files` contains envelope child files.

parameters.name: uuid
parameters.description: The UUID of the LibreSign file

parameters.name: showVisibleElements
parameters.description: Whether to include visible elements in the response

parameters.name: showMessages
parameters.description: Whether to include validation messages in the response

parameters.name: showValidateFile
parameters.description: Whether to include the file payload in the response

parameters.name: OCS-APIRequest
parameters.description: Required to be true for the API request to pass

get.description: Validate a file returning file data. The response always includes `filesCount` and `files`. For `nodeType=file`, `filesCount=1` and `files` contains the current file. For `nodeType=envelope`, `files` contains envelope child files.

parameters.description: The identifier value of the LibreSign file

parameters.name: showVisibleElements

post.description: Validate a binary file returning file data. Use field 'file' for the file upload. The response always includes `filesCount` and `files`. For `nodeType=file`, `filesCount=1` and `files` contains the current file. For `nodeType=envelope`, `files` contains envelope child files.

parameters.name: OCS-APIRequest
parameters.description: Required to be true for the API request to pass

post.description:
Send a new file to Nextcloud and return the fileId to request signature. Files must be uploaded as multipart/form-data with field name 'file[]' or 'files[]'.
**Note on multiple file uploads:** PHP has a limit on the number of files that can be uploaded in a single request (max_file_uploads directive, default 20). When uploading many files (more than 20), consider uploading them sequentially in multiple requests or use individual file uploads like the Files app does.

name.description: The name of file to sign

settings.description: Settings to define how and where the file should be stored

files.description: Multiple files to create an envelope (optional, use either file or files)

parameters.name: OCS-APIRequest
parameters.description: Required to be true for the API request to pass

post.description: Add one or more files to an existing envelope that is in DRAFT status. Files must be uploaded as multipart/form-data with field name 'files[]'.

parameters.name: uuid
parameters.description: The UUID of the envelope

parameters.name: OCS-APIRequest
parameters.description: Required to be true for the API request to pass

422.description: Cannot add files (envelope not in DRAFT status or validation failed)

delete.description: This will delete the file and all data

parameters.description: LibreSign file ID

parameters.name: deleteFile
parameters.description: Whether to delete the physical file from Nextcloud (default: true)

get.summary: Check file progress by sign request UUID with long-polling (similar to Talk)
get.description: Waits up to 30 seconds for status change using cache for efficiency. Returns progress for the specific sign request, not the global file status.

parameters.description: Sign request UUID

parameters.name: timeout
parameters.description: Maximum seconds to wait (default 30)

parameters.name: OCS-APIRequest
parameters.description: Required to be true for the API request to pass

post.description: Request that a file be signed by a list of signers. Each signer in the signers array can optionally include a 'signingOrder' field to control the order of signatures when ordered signing flow is enabled. The returned `data` always includes `filesCount` and `files`. For `nodeType=file`, `filesCount=1` and `files` contains the current file. For `nodeType=envelope`, `files` contains envelope child files.

signers.description: Collection of signers who must sign the document. Use identifyMethods as the canonical format. Other supported fields: displayName, description, notify, signingOrder, status

name.description: The name of file to sign

settings.description: Settings to define how and where the file should be stored

file.description: File object. Supports nodeId, url, base64 or path.

files.description: Multiple files to create an envelope (optional, use either file or files). Each file supports nodeId, url, base64 or path.

callback.description: URL that will receive a POST after the document is signed

status.description: Numeric code of status * 0 - no signers * 1 - signed * 2 - pending

signatureFlow.description: Signature flow mode: 'parallel' or 'ordered_numeric'. If not provided, uses global configuration

parameters.name: OCS-APIRequest
parameters.description: Required to be true for the API request to pass

file.description: File object. Supports nodeId, url, base64 or path when creating a new request.

status.description: Numeric code of status * 0 - no signers * 1 - signed * 2 - pending

signatureFlow.description: Signature flow mode: 'parallel' or 'ordered_numeric'. If not provided, uses global configuration
